app.title: I Have Access To Notifications
app.message: Just a reminder that Frostnova-sensei continues to carry the collective IQ of this community on his back. Meanwhile, Akimitsu remains committed to discovering bugs that nobody else could find because nobody else would even think to do the things he does. Truly inspirational. Anyway, have a nice day. This announcement was brought to you by poor decision making and unrestricted access to production.

website.title: ShonenX RE is OUT!
website.message: There maybe bugs in the RE, but overall you can use the app watch shit normally or read manga, Manga feature is very new so deal with bugs for now.
